name: Shiva Rama Krishna Bodala
title: Professional Photographer & Videographer
summary: Passionate Photographer & Videographer with 3 years of experience delivering high-quality visual content across events and productions. Progressed from Photography Assistant → Professional Photographer & Videographer through consistent delivery, technical growth, and strong client collaboration. Experienced in event coverage, corporate shoots, weddings, promotional content, social media visuals, and end-to-end video production—from pre-production planning to post-production delivery.

photography:
• Event Photography
  • Corporate Photography
  • Wedding Photography
  • Portrait Photography
  • Product Photography
  • Fashion Photography
  • Documentary Photography
  • Outdoor & Indoor Shoots
videography:
• Event Videography
  • Corporate Videos
  • Promotional Videos
  • Interviews & Testimonials
  • Social Media Content
  • Cinematic Storytelling
  • Multi-Camera Coverage
  • Basic Drone Operations

responsibilities: **Key responsibilities**
Lead photo + video coverage for events and client projects.
Capture high-quality visuals for corporate, commercial, social, and special events.
Plan shot lists and execute creative visual storytelling based on the brief.
Manage camera systems, lenses, lighting setups, and accessories during productions.
Coordinate with clients and internal teams to ensure smooth shoot execution.
Perform selection, editing, color correction, and final content delivery.
Create content optimized for digital and social platforms.
Stay updated on trends, cinematography techniques, and new camera tech.
**International Assignment – Dubai & Oman (3 Months)**
Selected by the company to support photography and videography projects across Dubai and Oman.
Covered corporate events, conferences, award ceremonies, and promotional campaigns for international clients.
Collaborated with multicultural teams and adapted to diverse project requirements.
Captured high-quality visual content for marketing, branding, and event documentation.
Gained valuable exposure to international event coverage and client management.
**Key achievements**
Delivered consistent, high-quality content within tight timelines across multiple categories.
Recognized for professional growth and promoted internally from Assistant Photographer.
Expanded technical capability through advanced camera and production learning.
Covered high-profile corporate events for Emaar, one of the largest real estate developers in Dubai, delivering professional event photography and visual documentation.
Participated in the coverage of the Andhra Pradesh Seaplane Launch Event, documenting a landmark initiative in the state’s transportation and tourism sector.
Supported visual coverage for the Amaravati Drone Summit, capturing keynote sessions, exhibitions, demonstrations, and networking activities.
Contributed to the photography and videography coverage of the Miss World’2026 event activities in Telangana, working in a large-scale international event environment.
**Key responsibilities**
Assisted senior photographers/videographers during shoots.
Prepared and maintained cameras, lenses, lighting equipment, and accessories.
Supported event setup, shot preparation, and equipment logistics.
Managed media storage, backups, and file organization.
Supported post-production workflows.
Learned professional techniques, camera handling, and production processes.
**Key achievements**
Built a strong technical/creative foundation across multiple event formats.
Demonstrated reliability and rapid improvement leading to promotion.
